description: Sanctions screening false positive — SDN name match against individual customer cleared with supporting evidence documented
parsed_text:
CUSTOMER DUE DILIGENCE — SANCTIONS SCREENING DISPOSITION RECORD
Customer Name: Omar Hassan Al-Rashid
Customer Type: Individual
Date of Birth: 1980-02-25   SSN: XXX-XX-4417
Address: 3305 N. Clark Street, Apt 7, Chicago, IL 60657, USA
Phone: (773) 555-0189   Email: omar.alrashid@example.com
Occupation: Software Engineer
Employer: Apex Technology Solutions Inc, Chicago IL
Source of Funds: Salary
Expected Monthly Activity: $9,500

SANCTIONS SCREENING ALERT — FALSE POSITIVE DISPOSITION
Initial Screening Result: POTENTIAL MATCH — System flagged customer name against OFAC SDN List entry: "Omar Hassan Al Rashid" (SDN Ref: SDNT-XXXXXXX441) — designated entity associated with narcotics trafficking, designation date 2018-11-04.
Alert Generated: 2025-10-22 09:14 UTC

FALSE POSITIVE ANALYSIS
Analyst: Kenji Watanabe, Sanctions Compliance Analyst
Analysis Date: 2025-10-22

Disposition Basis — Name Match Only:
(a) Date of Birth: Customer DOB 1980-02-25 does NOT match SDN entry DOB 1962-07-09. MISMATCH.
(b) Nationality/Country: Customer is a US citizen (USC). SDN entry lists nationality as Yemeni. MISMATCH.
(c) Address: Customer's Chicago IL address does not correspond to any address listed on SDN entry (Aden, Yemen; Dubai, UAE). MISMATCH.
(d) Passport/ID: Customer presented US Passport P-XXXX1123, Exp 2031-03-22. SDN entry references Yemeni travel document. MISMATCH.
(e) Employer verification: Apex Technology Solutions Inc (FEIN XX-XXX6641) confirmed employing customer since 2017 — corroborates stated occupation and source of funds.

Conclusion: Match is a false positive. The five independent discriminating factors (DOB, nationality, country of birth, address, and document type) confirm this customer is not the SDN-listed individual.

DISPOSITION
Final Status: False Positive — Cleared.
Approver: Linda Marchetti, VP Compliance
Approval Date: 2025-10-23
SAR Filing Required: No — false positive; no suspicious activity identified.

RISK ASSESSMENT
PEP Status: No
Sanctions Status: False Positive — Cleared
Adverse Media: No adverse media found.
Risk Rating: Low
CDD Level: Standard
Review Date: 2025-10-23   Reviewer: Kenji Watanabe
